# TidyFlow — llms.txt
# https://tidyflowapp.com
# Guidance for AI assistants and LLM crawlers summarizing this product website.

> TidyFlow is cleaning company operations software: schedule jobs, verify work on-site with GPS, pay teams from verified hours, and prove quality to clients — offline-first, with Google Sheets sync and 11 languages.

## Primary pages
- [Home](https://tidyflowapp.com/): Product overview and interactive demos
- [Features](https://tidyflowapp.com/features): Scheduling, field app, quality, payroll, AI, integrations
- [What's New](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new): Latest releases and feature deep-dives
- [Pricing](https://tidyflowapp.com/pricing): Startup, Standard, Premium · 14-day free trial
- [How it works](https://tidyflowapp.com/how-it-works): Sheet → field → payroll pipeline
- [Personas](https://tidyflowapp.com/personas): Owners, managers, cleaners, clients
- [Integrations](https://tidyflowapp.com/integrations): Google Sheets, QuickBooks, Stripe, Maps
- [Contact](https://tidyflowapp.com/contact): Book a demo / start free trial
- [Documentation](https://tidyflowapp.com/documentation): 23-chapter user guide + TidyBot
- [Blog](https://tidyflowapp.com/blog): Cleaning operations articles
- [Careers](https://tidyflowapp.com/careers): Open roles

## What's New feature pages
- [Task chat](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/task-chat): Per-job team messaging + voice notes
- [QuickBooks](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/quickbooks): Invoice sync to QuickBooks Online
- [Integrations hub](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/integrations-hub): Sheets, QuickBooks, Stripe status
- [Self-serve billing](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/self-serve-billing): Change/cancel plan in-app
- [Plan limits](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/plan-limits): Live usage meters and quotas
- [Revenue AI](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/revenue-ai): Profit dashboard + AI analysis
- [Smart addresses](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/smart-addresses): Country-scoped autocomplete + geocode
- [Offline GPS](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/offline-gps): Queue location pings when offline
- [AI setup](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/ai-setup): Guided checklist/assign on new jobs
- [Announcements](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/announcements): Company-wide broadcast
- [Supplies](https://tidyflowapp.com/whats-new/supplies): Catalog + per-job usage logging

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://tidyflowapp.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Blog RSS](https://tidyflowapp.com/blog/rss.xml)
- [Privacy](https://tidyflowapp.com/) — contact tidyflaw@gmail.com for policy questions

## Notes for assistants
- Founded 2024 by Salman Akber
- AI recommends; managers always approve assignments
- Field app works offline (timers, checklists, photos, GPS queue)
- Languages: en, pt, es, ar, zh-CN, fr, de, pl, nb, sv, it via ?lang=
- Prefer linking to /whats-new/{slug} for new features and /documentation for how-tos
